summary: Iteration 69 - Schedule Edit, Mark-Paid, Delete Features. All features working correctly: (1) Backend PUT /api/current-accounts/{accountId}/schedule/{scheduleId} updates schedule entry fields (label, due_date, expected_amount). (2) Backend POST /api/current-accounts/{accountId}/schedule/{scheduleId}/mark-paid creates repayment with schedule_id link, idempotent (returns already_paid=true on duplicate). (3) Backend DELETE /api/current-accounts/{accountId}/schedule/{scheduleId} removes schedule entry. (4) Enrich logic updated: schedule entry is 'paid' if repayment has matching schedule_id OR cumulative logic covers it. (5) Frontend inline edit mode with 3 inputs (date, label, amount) + Save/Cancel buttons. (6) Frontend mark-paid button (green CheckCircle) shows confirm dialog, creates repayment, entry shows line-through + green styling. (7) Frontend delete button (red Trash2) shows confirm dialog, removes entry.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend current_accounts.py lines 272-299: PUT /schedule/{scheduleId} correctly updates individual fields without replacing entire schedule array.
Backend current_accounts.py lines 322-365: POST /schedule/{scheduleId}/mark-paid creates repayment with schedule_id link, handles idempotency via existing repayment check.
Backend current_accounts.py lines 302-311: DELETE /schedule/{scheduleId} uses MongoDB $pull for atomic removal.
Backend current_accounts.py lines 99-108: Enrich logic correctly checks both schedule_id match AND cumulative logic for paid status.

Frontend CurrentAccountsTab.jsx lines 183-238: State management for editingScheduleId, scheduleEditForm, and helper functions (startEditSchedule, saveScheduleEdit, deleteScheduleEntry, markScheduleAsPaid).
Frontend CurrentAccountsTab.jsx lines 430-510: Schedule entry rendering with conditional inline edit form and 3 action buttons (mark-paid, edit, delete) with correct data-testids.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Iter69_Schedule_UI account with 3 schedule entries for UI testing, deleted after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 69 added schedule inline edit, mark-paid, and delete features. Backend endpoints: PUT /api/current-accounts/{accountId}/schedule/{scheduleId}, POST /api/current-accounts/{accountId}/schedule/{scheduleId}/mark-paid, DELETE /api/current-accounts/{accountId}/schedule/{scheduleId}. Frontend has 3 action buttons per schedule entry (data-testids: schedule-mark-paid-{id}, schedule-edit-btn-{id}, schedule-delete-{id}). Inline edit mode shows date/label/amount inputs with save (schedule-save-{id}) and cancel buttons. Mark-paid creates repayment with schedule_id link. Paid entries show green styling with line-through text and no mark-paid button.
